steps: Mix seawater and double distilled water
Prepare stock solution following formulation in guidelines
Prepare stock solutions and 0.2 µm filter them
Aseptically add each stock solution to seawater, mixing after each addition
Store in the dark Vit. B12 degrades in the light.
creator: Verve Team
